mapper.insert:
insert into score_entry ( course_id, student_id, semester_id, usual_score, final_score, exam_status, total_score, score_point ) values
( #{entry.courseId}, #{entry.studentId}, #{entry.semesterId}, #{entry.usualScore}, #{entry.finalScore}, #{entry.examStatus}, #{entry.totalScore}, #{entry.scorePoint} )
mapper.select: select se.id, se.course_id, c.course_name, se.student_id, s.name as studentName, s.student_no as studentNo, se.semester_id, sm.name as semesterName, se.usual_score, se.final_score, se.total_score, se.makeup_score, se.score_point, c.credit, se.exam_status, me.id as makeup_exam_id from score_entry se left join course c on se.course_id = c.id left join student s on se.student_id = s.id left join semester sm on se.semester_id = sm.id left join makeup_exam me on se.makeup_exam_id = me.id where se.id = #{id}

select se.id, c.course_name, s.name as studentName, s.student_no as studentNo, sm.name as semesterName, se.usual_score, se.final_score, se.total_score, se.score_point, c.credit, se.exam_status from score_entry se left join course c on se.course_id = c.id left join student s on se.student_id = s.id left join semester sm on se.semester_id = sm.id where s.class_id = #{classId} and se.semester_id = #{semesterId}

select s.id as studentId, s.name as studentName, s.student_no as studentNo, c.course_name as courseName, c.credit, sm.name as semesterName, cs.course_id as courseId, cs.semester_id as semesterId from course_schedule cs join course_schedule_class csc on csc.schedule_id = cs.id join student s on s.class_id = csc.class_id left join score_entry se on se.course_id = cs.course_id and se.student_id = s.id and se.semester_id = cs.semester_id left join course c on cs.course_id = c.id left join semester sm on cs.semester_id = sm.id where cs.course_id = #{courseId} and cs.semester_id = #{semesterId} and se.id is null order by s.student_no

select count(distinct s.id) as totalStudents, count(case when se.usual_score is not null and se.final_score is not null then 1 end) as recordedCount, count(case when se.usual_score is null or se.final_score is null then 1 end) as unrecordedCount, coalesce(avg(se.total_score), 0) as averageScore, coalesce((count(case when se.total_score >= 60 then 1 end) * 100.0) / nullif(count(se.id), 0), 0) as passRate from course_schedule cs join course_schedule_class csc on csc.schedule_id = cs.id join class cl on csc.class_id = cl.id join student s on s.class_id = cl.id left join score_entry se on se.student_id = s.id and se.course_id = cs.course_id and se.semester_id = cs.semester_id where cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and cs.semester_id = #{semesterId}

select case when se.total_score >= 90 then '90-100' when se.total_score >= 80 then '80-89' when se.total_score >= 70 then '70-79' when se.total_score >= 60 then '60-69' else '0-59' end as scoreRange, count(*) as count from score_entry se join course_schedule cs on se.course_id = cs.course_id and se.semester_id = cs.semester_id where cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and se.semester_id = #{semesterId} and se.total_score is not null group by case when se.total_score >= 90 then '90-100' when se.total_score >= 80 then '80-89' when se.total_score >= 70 then '70-79' when se.total_score >= 60 then '60-69' else '0-59' end order by scoreRange
